business.name: Apex Movement Lab
business.tagline: Strength, mobility, and coaching that fits real schedules.
business.description: Boutique training studio combining small-group classes, personal training, and recovery tools for busy professionals.
business.address: 440 King St W, Toronto, ON M5V 1K4

hero.headline: Train smarter. Move better.
hero.subheadline: Coached sessions, structured programs, and a supportive crew—no intimidation, no guesswork.

services.name: Small-group strength
services.description: Progressive 45-minute blocks capped at eight athletes per coach.

services.name: 1:1 coaching
services.description: Custom programming, form checks, and accountability for specific goals.

services.name: Mobility & recovery
services.description: Guided sessions with bands, rollers, and breath work to complement lifting.

about.headline: Built for consistency
about.body: We program in four-week waves, track loads in app, and adjust when life gets hectic—so you keep showing up.

testimonials.author: Elena V.
testimonials.quote: Finally a gym where coaches actually teach instead of leaving you on the machines.

testimonials.author: Jordan P.
testimonials.quote: My back pain is down and my deadlift is up. Programming is thoughtful.

seo.title: Apex Movement Lab | Small-Group Training Toronto King West
seo.description: Boutique strength and mobility studio in Toronto. Small-group classes, personal training, intro session free.
